---
title: "Divorces in Denmark"
author: "Mark Pagh, Marie Lund and Ina Thomsen"
date: "2026-05-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

#Library - MP
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(here)

```



```{r data}
#Load data + cleaning na - MJ
Skilsmisse <- read_csv2(here("data/Skilsmisser.CSV"), na = "NULL")

#Data inspections - MJ
head(Skilsmisse)
glimpse(Skilsmisse)


```


```{r graph}
##ggplot - IT
Skilsmisse %>%
  tail(157) %>%
  ggplot( aes(x=Year, y=Divorces)) +
  geom_line(color="darkgreen") +
  geom_point(color="darkgreen") +
  xlim(1869, 2025) +
  ylim(0, 20000) +
  scale_x_continuous(n.breaks = 15)+
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 10)+
  ggtitle("Divorces in Denmark 1869-2025")

```
